title: Dark Indulgent Ukrainian Chocolate Dumplings
description: A rich and herbal Ukrainian dessert featuring dark chocolate and chewy dumplings, low in glycemic index for a guilt-free treat. This dish combines the best of Eastern European flavors with the decadence of dark chocolate.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, sour cream, dried mint leaves, vanilla extract, and salt until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a tablespoon of dark chocolate chips in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the chocolate to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and gently add the dumplings to the pot.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and place them on a plate.
Drizzle the dumplings with buckwheat honey and serve warm.
